\begin{circuitikz}
    \draw (0,0)     node[op amp] (opamp) {}
    (opamp.+)       -- ++(-1,0)
                    node[ground] {}                   
    (opamp.-)       to[short, *-] ++(0,1) coordinate(tmp)
                    to[R, l^=$R_f$, i>^=$I_\text{tot}$] (tmp -| opamp.out)
                    to[short, -*] (opamp.out)
    (opamp.-)       to[short, -*] ++(-0.5,0) coordinate(tmp)
                    to[R, l_=$R_3$, i<^=$I_3$, -o] ++(-2.5,0)
                    node[left] {$V_3$}
    (tmp)           to[short, -*] ++(0,1) coordinate(tmp)
                    to[R, l_=$R_2$, i<_=$I_2$, -o] ++(-2.5,0)
                    node[left] {$V_2$}
    (tmp)           to[short] ++(0,1) coordinate(tmp)
                    to[R, l_=$R_1$, i<_=$I_1$, -o] ++(-2.5,0)
                    node[left] {$V_1$}
    (opamp.out)     to[short,-o] ++(1,0)
                    node[right] {$V_\text{out}$};                
\end{circuitikz}
